ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that recorded the data */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the sensor reading */,
  "elapsed_time" INTEGER /* Elapsed time in seconds since the last reading */,
  "piezo_value" INTEGER /* Value measured by the piezometer */,
  "bucket_flip" INTEGER /* Indicates if a bucket flip event occurred */,
  "bucket_count" INTEGER /* Count of bucket flips */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor at the time of reading */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of reading */,
  "third_party_data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to third-party data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" INTEGER /* Type of sensor (e.g., piezometer, bucket counter) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last maintained */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "sensor_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "sensor_firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the sensor */,
  "sensor_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "sensor_description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_sensor_type FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type") REFERENCES sensor_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of environment */,
  "site_manager" TEXT /* Name of the site manager */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "data_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency at which data is collected */,
  "data_units" INTEGER /* Units in which the data is measured */,
  "sensor_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "sensor_description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_types_data_frequency FOREIGN KEY ("data_frequency") REFERENCES data_frequencies ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_types_data_units FOREIGN KEY ("data_units") REFERENCES data_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the data frequency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data frequency */,
  "frequency_interval" TEXT /* Interval of the data frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit of measurement */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit of measurement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit of measurement */,
  "unit_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the unit of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., scientist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor reading being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sensor reading */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor reading was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES sensor_readings ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance event */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_maintenance_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration event */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the calibration was performed */,
  "calibration_value" REAL /* Calibration value applied */,
  "calibrated_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the calibration */,
  "calibration_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the calibration activity */,
  "calibration_cost" REAL /* Cost of the calibration activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibrations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
